# kSecAttrProtocol

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the item’s protocol.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrProtocol: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] and denotes the protocol for this item (see [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/item-attribute-keys-and-values#Protocol-Values]). Items of class [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecClassInternetPassword] have this attribute.
title: kSecAttrProtocol
